title: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74
summary_full: He took power in 1996 after staging a bloodless coup against his father, and went on to transform Qatar into the gas-rich power it is today.
summary_public: He took power in 1996 after staging a bloodless coup against his father, and went on to transform Qatar into the gas-rich power it is today.
